title: Offbeat question generation from any topic
use_when: Offbeat question generation from any topic. Use when the user needs a product workflow for ideation & creativity related to offbeat question generation from any topic. Trigger terms: creativity, brainstorming, questions, perspective-shifting.
do_not_use_when: Do not use Offbeat question generation from any topic when the request is mainly a different lifecycle artifact; route to the narrower Productize skill that owns that artifact instead. Do not use it when the user lacks enough context to distinguish facts, assumptions, and decision risk.
output_artifact: Offbeat question generation from any topic product artifact with evidence, risks, recommendation, and next action
framework_fit: Offbeat question generation from any topic fits Discovery work in the Think lifecycle when the user needs Offbeat question generation from any topic product artifact with evidence, risks, recommendation, and next action and has enough product context to make tradeoffs explicit. Use it to produce a decision-ready artifact, not a framework tour.
failure_modes: Produces Offbeat question generation from any topic product artifact with evidence, risks, recommendation, and next action without tying recommendations to the user's Think stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats Offbeat question generation from any topic as generic Discovery advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from Offbeat question generation from any topic when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.

examples.prompt: Use $offbeat-question-generation-from-any-topic to turn this offbeat context into a decision-ready Offbeat question generation from any topic product artifact with evidence, risks, recommendation, and next action.
examples.expected_artifact: Offbeat question generation from any topic product artifact with evidence, risks, recommendation, and next action
